form.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a scorching early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 1.5 lengths third (23.84) over 425m at Bendigo. Should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a scorching early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 1.5 lengths third (23.84) over 425m at Bendigo. Should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Last start finished 7th on April 5 over 425m at Bendigo behind Biscottino beaten 12 lengths (24.34) in a R/A FIN. Was in the money four on end before missing the frame last time. Worth another try.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 7th on April 5 over 425m at Bendigo behind Biscottino beaten 12 lengths (24.34) in a R/A FIN. Was in the money four on end before missing the frame last time. Worth another try.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest when third (23.01) over 400m at Warragul. Has a low draw. Top-three aspirations.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest when third (23.01) over 400m at Warragul. Has a low draw. Top-three aspirations.

form.formComment: Comes off a (26.01) win last time, scoring by 1.5 lengths in a Mix 6/7 over 460m at this track. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and three places from five starts. Tough line-up and may struggle.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Comes off a (26.01) win last time, scoring by 1.5 lengths in a Mix 6/7 over 460m at this track. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and three places from five starts. Tough line-up and may struggle.

form.formComment: Has won his last two. Good effort to score just five days ago over 425m at Bendigo by 4 lengths in a Mix 6/7. Looks well placed to make it three straight.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has won his last two. Good effort to score just five days ago over 425m at Bendigo by 4 lengths in a Mix 6/7. Looks well placed to make it three straight.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked turning out of back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by 3 lengths at Bendigo (23.74) beating Onyx Lass in a Restricted WIN H on March 27. Capable of taking this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by 3 lengths at Bendigo (23.74) beating Onyx Lass in a Restricted WIN H on March 27. Capable of taking this out.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at The Meadows to win by 1.75 lengths in 30.44, beating Miss Sparkles. Last start finished 5th over 525m at The Meadows beaten 7 lengths (30.60) behind My Mate Leo in a Mix 6/7 FIN on April 4. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Warrnambool over 450m. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors at big odds last time when second (22.96) at Warrnambool, making it two placings on end. Prefer others.
